name: blueprint
description: Write cross-platform native apps with React and JUCE

scripts.build:jsui: npm run build:react-juce && npm --prefix examples/GainPlugin/jsui install && npm --prefix examples/GainPlugin/jsui run build
scripts.build:playground-jsui: npm run build:react-juce && npm --prefix examples/PlaygroundPlugin/jsui install && npm --prefix examples/PlaygroundPlugin/jsui run build
scripts.build:examples-jsui: npm run build:react-juce && npm --prefix examples/GainPlugin/jsui install && npm --prefix examples/GainPlugin/jsui run build && npm --prefix examples/PlaygroundPlugin/jsui install && npm --prefix examples/PlaygroundPlugin/jsui run build
scripts.build:gainplugin: npm run build:jsui && npm run build:native
scripts.build:playground: npm run build:playground-jsui && npm run build:native
scripts.build: npm run configure && npm run build:gainplugin
